sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n23012" key="gunaikeraste/w" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">γῠναικ-εραστέω</orth>, <sense id="n23012.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">to be a lover of women,</tr_> and <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">γῠναικ-εραστής</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">οῦ</itype>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ὁ</gen>, <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">woman-lover,</tr_> <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0542.tlg001:3:68" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Poll.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">3.68</biblScope></bibl>,<bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0542.tlg001:70" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">70</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
